intro: The island market is a riot of colour and noise. Stalls overflow with goods carried in from a dozen distant regions, things you would never see anywhere else.
title: The Import Bazaar
description: A bustling island bazaar trading in imported held items and supplies. Step in to browse a real shop and spend your money on what you need, or move along.

1.label: Browse the bazaar
1.tooltip: (+) Open the shop - buy imported held items + supplies at fair prices
1.selected: You weave through the stalls to see what the traders are selling...

2.label: Move on
2.selected: You take in the bustle for a moment, then move along.
